title: CAT Handoff Packet
description: Structured dispatch packet passed when one CAT agent hands work to another.

packet_id.description: Unique handoff packet identifier, e.g. HOP-CAT-A011-01

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the handoff

from_role.description: Role of the agent handing off work

to_role.description: Role of the agent receiving work

bead_id.description: BEAD identifier this handoff is associated with

context_paths.description: File paths the receiving agent needs to read

continuity.description: State continuity information for the receiving agent

prior_state.description: Summary of work completed before this handoff

next_action.description: First action the receiving agent should take

allowed_paths.description: Paths the receiving agent is permitted to access

tool_budget.description: Maximum tool call counts for the receiving agent

reviewer.description: Role or identifier of the agent designated to review this handoff
